FAQ

Most common questions from parents

This section should quickly answer the most basic concerns. Clear, shorter and without chaos.

How does the registration process work? +

The parent fills in the form on the website and the organizer comes back with further details, documents and organizational information.

When are payment details sent? +

Payment details are sent after the child is registered and after contact with the organizer.

Can documents be downloaded from the website? +

Yes. The most important documents are collected in one place so parents do not need to search for them in messages.

Where does the departure take place from? +

Departure cities and transport details are completed in each offer and also provided after registration.

What if I have additional questions? +

The best way is to go to the Contact page or call / write directly to the organizer.

Next step

You have the documents and want to move on?

Go to the registration form or contact the organizer directly.

Go to registration Contact
MK SPORT Camps for children

Camps and holiday trips for children and teenagers. Activity, good organization, parent communication and memorable trips.
